title: Big Mom’s Agents Arrive

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, don't worry yourself about them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We should go and help them look!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Which way to the town, zero?

summary: Big Mom’s Agents Arrive. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
